scenes.purpose: Meet protagonist as he starts troubleshooting a ghosting problem.
scenes.objective: Quickly identify and fix the issue before data loss occurs.
scenes.turning_point: The loop unexpectedly activates, making it difficult to debug.

scenes.purpose: Show the ghost's presence causing system errors and crashes.
scenes.objective: Maintain order in the data center despite escalating chaos.
scenes.turning_point: Protagonist realizes the loop is self-reinforcing, feeding on his own fixes.

scenes.purpose: Introduce protagonist's personal frustration and creative solution.
scenes.objective: Find an unconventional fix to break the ghost loop.
scenes.turning_point: He decides to play along with the ghost, feeding it more of its own code to overwhelm it.

scenes.purpose: Show the ghost's confusion and ultimate defeat as it consumes itself.
scenes.objective: Observe the consequences of protagonist's unorthodox solution.
scenes.turning_point: The loop collapses under its own weight, eliminating the ghost in the shell.
beats: admin feeds the ghost more code

scenes.purpose: Cap off the story with a satisfied admin, hinting at future challenges.
scenes.objective: Reflect on his experience and prepare for new technical battles ahead.
scenes.turning_point: He ponders what other creative fixes might be needed in the future.
